_comment: Expected cadence for each SCHEDULED job. freshness.py flags a job as STALE if its newest run is older than max_age, MISSING if it has never run, or FAILING if its newest run exited non-zero. Only list jobs actually scheduled in scheduler/manifest.yml; max_age = the real interval plus slack for a missed beat. Durations: Nd / Nh / Nm. Ships pre-seeded with just the demo job (SEED-017) — add an entry here for every real job you schedule.
